scene_title: Cidade antiga em chamas ao horizonte
narrative_beat: Coluna grega com horizonte em fogo

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a panoramic wide shot of an ancient city burning on the horizon at sunset, viewed from a distant hill
subject.focal_point: the entire burning horizon reflecting crimson-gold on low clouds
subject.secondary: A fallen Greek column lies in the foreground; no people visible; smoke plumes rise across horizon

composition.foreground: fallen column and horizon flames in saturated ochre-crimson
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white distant cityscape in smoke

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, crimson-amber grading, anamorphic flare
style.texture_detail: 35mm grain, smoke and ash in air

symbolism.primary: pyrrhos as the color of a city at its last light
symbolism.secondary: fallen column as relic of fallen peace

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
